title: SSH Misconfigured
description: sshd is down after a maintenance config change. Two faults: wrong port (2222) and password authentication disabled.
lesson: Always run sshd -t before restarting sshd. A locked-out server is a P1 incident.
hint_1: check if sshd is running and test the config
hint_2: read /etc/ssh/sshd_config — Port and PasswordAuthentication are wrong
success: sshd is running on port 22 with password auth enabled. Incident resolved.
fail: sshd is still not running correctly on port 22.
